emails.subject: Re: SO2 Derivatives
emails.body: Re: SO2 Derivatives Terry: Hope you are doing well. I will e-mail to you later today a copy of the Master Purchase and Sale Agreement that we use here in the US for the trading of SO2 emission allowances or credits. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact me. My direct phone line is 713-853-3214. Regards, Alan Mark E Haedicke 04/20/2001 06:06 PM
